conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 12 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | Overall
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed overall response (complete or partial response) of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document focuses on time-to-event endpoints such as overall survival, PSA progression-free survival, and clinical progression-free survival, rather than overall response rates (complete or partial response) for metastatic disease."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Objective Response Rate (ORR) and its components (Complete Response, Stable Disease, Progressive Disease) for the treatment arm were not found in the provided document pages or through semantic search."

---
Column 2: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | CR
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed complete response of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document focuses on time-to-event endpoints such as overall survival, PSA progression-free survival, and clinical progression-free survival, rather than complete response rates for metastatic disease."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Complete Response (CR) for the treatment arm was not found in the provided document pages or through semantic search."

Column 3: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | SD
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed stable metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.

  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Stable Disease (SD) for the treatment arm was not found in the provided document pages or through semantic search."

Column 4: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | PD
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed progression of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document reports on 'progression of prostate cancer' as an event leading to treatment discontinuation or further therapy, but not as a specific percentage of patients with progressive disease within an overall response rate assessment."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Progressive Disease (PD) for the treatment arm was not found in the provided document pages or through semantic search."
